criteriaCoverage.evidence: applyEventToFeatures + buildFeatureUpsert mirror; features-core 20 unit; features-aggregate integration on real PG via runPlanInWorkspaceTx (prod path): total/counters/monetary/last_event_at advances/last_email_open_at MAX + REPLAY no double-count, one events row. Independently re-verified: replay byte-for-byte unchanged even with mutated amount, older event doesn't regress last_event_at, non-numeric amount -> 0 no NaN.

workspace_id $1 every statement; profile_id via (workspace_id,external_id) subquery never client; features-workspace-scoping 2 tests on BYPASSRLS pool prove two ws same external_id keep separate rows counting only own events, distinct profile_id, one row per ws. postgres role rolbypassrls=true confirms in-code isolation not RLS.

recommendations: buildEventInsert is superseded by buildFeatureUpsert in planProcessing but still exported/unused; remove dead export to avoid drift.
Add integration test for GREATEST against NULL prior last_email_open_at column directly.
Add end-to-end SQL test for numeric-string monetary amount (covered in pure layer only).
